apps.name: AlphaBot Trading Engine
apps.description: Autonomous stock trading bot with deep learning price prediction models. Backtesting engine with 20 years of historical data, paper trading mode, and live execution via Alpaca API. RBAC for strategy access, full audit trail of every trade decision with reasoning chain.
features: trade decision audit log with AI reasoning

apps.name: SignalGrid Recommendations
apps.description: AI-powered buy/sell/hold recommendation engine across 3 asset classes — stocks, crypto, and ETFs. Each recommendation includes confidence score, risk rating, and supporting research. RSS-enabled market intelligence feed with RBAC-gated premium signals.

apps.name: ViperQuant Research Suite
apps.description: Institutional-grade research platform with AI-driven fundamental and technical analysis. SEC filing parser, earnings call NLP sentiment, and 50+ technical indicators. CMS for publishing research reports with RBAC editor/reviewer roles and audit logging.
features: audit log of all published research

apps.name: QuantEdge Strategy Lab
apps.description: No-code quantitative strategy builder with Python fallback for advanced users. Drag-and-drop signal composition, walk-forward optimization, Monte Carlo simulation, and strategy marketplace. RBAC per-strategy permissions with full execution audit.

apps.name: ETFRadar Scanner
apps.description: AI-powered ETF screening with factor analysis, sector rotation signals, and expense ratio optimization. Compare ETFs by holdings overlap, track inflows/outflows, and get rebalancing recommendations. RSS feed of ETF news with RBAC portfolio access.

apps.name: MosaicAI Analyzer
apps.description: Aggregates research from 50+ sources — analyst reports, social sentiment (Reddit/Twitter), on-chain data, and macro indicators. AI synthesizes into actionable briefs with accuracy tracking. CMS dashboard builder with RBAC and full audit logging.

apps.name: DarkPool Insights
apps.description: Track dark pool trades, unusual options activity, and institutional 13F filings. AI detects accumulation/distribution patterns before price moves. Real-time alerts via webhook, RBAC-gated institutional data, and trade-decision audit chain.

apps.name: RSSFeed Market Pulse
apps.description: AI-curated financial news aggregator with 200+ RSS feeds from Bloomberg, Reuters, CoinDesk, SEC, and fintwit. NLP-powered sentiment scoring, topic clustering, and breaking news alerts. CMS for custom feed curation with RBAC editor roles.

apps.name: HedgeNet Portfolio Manager
apps.description: Modern portfolio theory meets deep learning. AI-optimized portfolio allocation across stocks, crypto, and ETFs with risk parity, Black-Litterman, and reinforcement learning strategies. RBAC for portfolio teams, rebalancing audit trail, and CMS performance reports.

apps.name: AltSignal Crypto Bot
apps.description: Crypto-focused trading bot with DEX and CEX support. On-chain analytics, whale wallet tracking, DeFi yield optimization, and MEV-aware execution. Binance/Coinbase API integration, RBAC for bot access, and full trade audit with P&L attribution.

apps.name: CrossMarket Arbitrage
apps.description: Real-time arbitrage detection across stock and crypto exchanges. Triangular arbitrage, cross-exchange spread capture, and statistical arbitrage with mean-reversion models. Sub-second execution, RBAC operator access, and profit/loss audit per trade.

apps.name: WaveForm Technical Charts
apps.description: TradingView-alternative charting platform with AI pattern recognition. Auto-detect head-and-shoulders, flags, and Fibonacci levels. CMS-driven dashboard layouts — save, share, and version chart configurations. RBAC for workspace teams with view audit logging.

apps.name: PortfolioForge CMS
apps.description: Headless CMS purpose-built for investment firms. Publish trade ideas, research notes, market commentary, and model portfolios. Compliance review workflow, RBAC author/editor/compliance roles, version-controlled content, and RSS syndication.

apps.name: NervePulse Sentiment
apps.description: Real-time sentiment analysis across financial news, social media, and earnings calls. Fear/greed index per ticker, sentiment momentum signals, and contrarian alert system. RBAC dashboard access with sentiment query audit logging.

apps.name: ZenithTrader Unified
apps.description: Bloomberg Terminal-inspired unified trading platform. Stocks, crypto, and ETF execution in one interface. AI research assistant, natural language trade commands, multi-account management, and CMS-driven customizable workspace. RBAC with team permissions and full audit trail.
